AIiDocumentationBlockElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a block-level documentation element.
AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a block-level documentation element.
AIiDocumentationCodeBlock - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a standalone code block.
AIiDocumentationCodeBlockWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a code block.
AIiDocumentationContainerElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a block-level documentation element that can contain child blocks.
AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a block-level documentation container.
AIiDocumentationDocument - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents the root of a documentation element tree.
AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation document.
AIiDocumentationElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a common renderer-neutral documentation element.
AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a renderer-neutral documentation element.
AIiDocumentationInlineCode - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents inline code inside textual content.
AIiDocumentationInlineCodeWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a inline code element.
AIiDocumentationInlineElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents an inline documentation element.
AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a inline documentation element.
AIiDocumentationLineBreak - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents an explicit line break inside inline content.
AIiDocumentationLineBreakWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a line break element.
AIiDocumentationLink - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a non-semantic inline link.
AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a link element.
AIiDocumentationParagraph - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a paragraph with ordered inline content.
AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation paragraph.
AIiDocumentationReference - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a semantic inline reference to another documented object.
AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a renderer-neutral target of a semantic documentation reference.
AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a semantic reference target.
AIiDocumentationReferenceWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a semantic reference element.
AIiDocumentationSection - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a hierarchical documentation section.
AIiDocumentationSectionWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation section.
AIiDocumentationTable - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a tabular block element.
AIiDocumentationTableCell - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a cell in a documentation table row.
AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation table cell.
AIiDocumentationTableColumn - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents metadata of a documentation table column.
AIiDocumentationTableColumnWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a table column.
AIiDocumentationTableRow - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents a row in a documentation table.
AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation table row.
AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a documentation table.
AIiDocumentationText - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Represents plain inline text.
AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Provides write access to a text element.

E

eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model - package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Renderer-neutral documentation element model.

Returns the stable table-local column identifier.
